generated_from: Fan-out 1 audits A-E (job-lifecycle, windows-integration, ui-qol, packaging, test-gap)
architecture: Packaged app = WebEngine: app/desktop/main.py -> app/ui/ (vanilla-JS window.LP IIFE + app.css) via bridge.py (QWebChannel). Engine = lecturepack/ (JobController, models/job.py) via engine_adapter.py::LecturePackAdapter. Old lecturepack/ui/ PySide pages NOT shipped. bridge.js SIGNALS array must stay synced with bridge.py signals.

shared_files_single_writer.app/desktop/engine_adapter.py: engine<->UI seam; job emit points (contention across phases)

independent_modules: app/desktop/win_integration.py (Phase 2 - injectable seams, fully fakeable, zero new deps)
dependency_edges: Phase2(windows facade + clean-state) independent of Phase1

2_platform_modules.win_integration: TODO: app/desktop/win_integration.py facade (keep-awake ctypes SetThreadExecutionState; taskbar hand-rolled ctypes ITaskbarList3; notifications QSystemTrayIcon; focus via QApplication.applicationState). Injectable PowerRequester/TaskbarButton/Notifier seams -> unit tests with fakes.

implementation_phases.3_queue_scheduler_pause: TODO: new lecturepack/services/job_queue.py (FIFO persist/reorder/RunNow/remove, one-active invariant); scheduler (tz-aware zoneinfo, missed policies run-next-open/skip/ask); cooperative STAGE-BOUNDARY pause in job_controller (no mid-stage resume exists; finish atomic op or clean-terminate + restart interrupted stage; replace QThread.terminate for align/export). Needs injected clock (add clock seam; no conftest.py exists).
implementation_phases.4_retry_completion_diagnostics: TODO: stage-specific retry (reset only failed stage, preserve completed - job_controller.run_pipeline currently bulk-resets ALL); completion metrics (duration/words/slides/study); redacted diagnostics (strip keys/creds/transcript).
implementation_phases.5_ui_integration_animation: TODO: app/ui — Settings>Notifications (6 toggles+test), completion panel + actions, retry UI, queue UI, schedule UI, pause/resume UI, Interrupted/Needs-Attention cards (Resume/Restart/View/Remove), NEW History screen, Processing empty state, notification click routing; animations (page transitions currently 300ms > 160-220 spec) + prefers-reduced-motion. Keep bridge.js SIGNALS synced.
implementation_phases.6_version_release: TODO: version.py -> 0.9.0-beta.3, win_version_info.txt, iss default AppVersion, About/What's New, CHANGELOG, release notes. Then build (Inno box), acceptance, upgrade test. STOP at user authorization.

release_blockers_resolved_so_far: startup stale-job reconciliation now session-aware + tested (was zero-coverage, unsafe once concurrent)
clean-state packaging gate now enforced + tested (was a §3 blocker, unimplemented)

notes.pause_reality: NO stage supports cooperative mid-stage resume today; all restart-from-scratch. Pause must be stage-boundary. §16 explicitly permits: finish current atomic op / clean-terminate, discard invalid partials, preserve verified outputs, resume by restarting only the interrupted stage.
notes.taskbar: QtWinExtras removed in Qt6 -> hand-roll ctypes ITaskbarList3 (zero new deps; comtypes/pywin32 are PyInstaller hazards).
notes.data_safety: data dir ~/LecturePackData is OUTSIDE install {app}; AppId {{9F5D2E31-7C4A-4B8E-9E1D-LECTUREPACK01}} stable -> upgrade preserves data. No schema-migration ladder (schema_version pinned 1) - beta.3 relies on Job.load backfill for new fields (implemented for lifecycle/session).
